---
title: "Project"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-09"
---

# Libraries
```{r}
library(rminer)
```

# Data
```{r}
baltimore <- read.csv("baltimore.csv", sep = ",")
lancaster <- read.csv("lancaster.csv", sep = ",")
philadelphia <- read.csv("philadelphia.csv", sep= ",")
richmond <- read.csv("richmond.csv", sep = ",")
```

# EDA & Pre-Processing
```{r}

```
